title: Optimized Modpacks Lite
description: The mod that would Optimize your PVP. :)
body:
![WHAT-IT-IS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29ea19105b0a8abd1a0d123b2b58aedb0c2ccce1.png)

This modpack is optimized **specifically for PvP — with a focus on Crystal PvP**.
While it's not completely "lightweight", **every mod included has a PvP or quality-of-life purpose.**  


- **BetterHurtCam by uku** = Aka No hurt cam very helpful. = [BetterHurtCam](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterhurtcam)
  
- **TotemCounter by uku** = rethink decisions before go into fight = [TotemCounter](https://modrinth.com/mod/totemcounter)

- **NoFog By Virtuoel** = Stright forward = [Nofog](https://modrinth.com/mod/no_fog)


> **FPS depends on your PC, this pack helps, but it’s not magic.**

---

![FUTURE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6530cd546d4a87c8b9667bb79b6c3c10ccbc84e8.png)

### Performance Optimizations
Boost FPS and reduce lag with performance-focused mods like **Sodium**, ensuring smoother combat and better PvP. I guess so.

### Crystal PvP & Respawn Anchor PvP.
- **Marlow’s Crystal Optimizer** by ImBram  
  Used by BEST Crystal PvPers like *Marlow* for optimized crystal rendering and performance.  
  [Mod Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/marlow-crystal-optimizer)

- **Hero's Anchor Optimizer** by herobane  **NOTE : this mod doesn't have 1.21.5**

  Removes fake respawn anchors.
  [Mod Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/heros-anchor-optimizer)


Modpack By: Therty_Thai
A modding idiot who crawled through over 100 pages of Modrinth to make your game faster. *You're welcome :)*
